app.title: English Irregular Verbs

instructions.typeInstruction: ⌨️ Type the past form using the keyboard.
instructions.incorrectDot: ⚪ Gray dot = mistakes made, word repeats
instructions.hintDot: 🔴 Red dot = hint used, word repeats
instructions.hintMechanic: ❌ Wrong letters turn red. After 3 mistakes, a hint appears (red dot recorded).

gameplay.hintMessage: 💡 The correct letter is highlighted. Click it to continue.
